message:
fix(ci): cargo fmt + defer JSONL reporter mkdir to onBegin

Apply cargo fmt to autocomplete test code from previous commit.
Move fs.mkdirSync in JSONL reporter from constructor to onBegin so
the test-results/e2e/ directory survives Playwright's outputDir
cleanup that runs between reporter construction and test execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
